title: 4Pcs Mini Stubby Screwdriver Set - 2-in-1 Interchangeable Handle Screwdriver for DIY Repairing
features: Package Includes: You will get 2 pieces green flat screwdriver and 2 pieces red cross-head screwdriver in the package, altogether 2 pieces, enough to meet your daily repairing need.
Material: Flat head and cross-head short screwdriver are made of chrome vanadium steel, which possesses nice hardness and good precision,reliable to be applied for long using time.
Easy Identify: The mini sewing machine screwdrivers are designed in red and green color for easy identification, you will find and distinguish the types of these screwdrivers easily.
Mini Size: Small and useful to fit in any toolbox. At the same time, remember to keep it from children at some distance.
Wide Usages: The mini short handle screwdrivers work well in narrow spaces, narrow areas or limited spaces, they are very suitable for repairing sewing machines.
